options.text: I'll ask John to take over my duties before I leave.
I hope someone can do it for me.
I'm not sure who will handle it.
I think I can finish it alone.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确说明了交接对象和时间，符合职场专业表达。干扰项中，'I hope...' 和 'I'm not sure...' 显得被动且不专业，'I can finish it alone' 未解决交接问题，不符合问题意图。

content.speakerText: Approved! Just send me the form.
content.speakerTextCn: 批准了！把申请表发我一下。

options.text: I'll send it over in the next hour.
I'll try to send it soon.
Do you really need the form?
I already sent it last week.

content.explanation: 正确答案承诺明确时间，体现专业性和执行力。'I'll try to...' 显得犹豫不决，'Do you really need...' 是质疑对方，'I already sent...' 与当前语境矛盾，均不符合职场回应规范。

content.speakerText: Can you confirm that the project handover is complete before your vacation?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能在休假前确认项目交接已完成吗？

options.text: Yes, I've briefed Lisa and shared all documents with her.
I think Lisa knows what to do.
I'll see if I can get it done.
I'm not sure when I'll finish.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用完成时态并具体说明行动（briefed, shared），体现责任担当。干扰项使用模糊表达（think, see if, not sure），缺乏确定性，不符合职场确认场景的严谨要求。
